title: narcissus papyraceus var. tingitanus
intro: Narcissus papyraceus var. tingitanus, also known as Moroccan narcissus or sweet narcissus, is a type of bulbous perennial plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to the presence of alkaloids such as galantamine. The health benefits of Narcissus papyraceus var. tingitanus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, depression, and insomnia, as well as its ability to boost cognitive function and memory. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or in a tea form, where it is consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
